evidence.scientific_clarity: Bezier-ribbon Sankey correctly shows Raw→Cleaned→Filtered→Train/Val/Test flow with labeled values, but all per-stage rejects collapse into one terminal node, obscuring where losses occur.
evidence.typography: Script explicitly sets fontfamily='DejaVu Sans' on every text call (the default the brief warns against); no rcParams pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype set.
evidence.palette: Red (#C44E52) assigned to the neutral 'Filtered' processing stage rather than a directional/negative concept; red+green pairing (Cleaned vs Filtered) is problematic for red-green colorblind viewers.
evidence.layout_density: 9×5 in figure with four columns and 22-unit gaps is reasonable; last column stacks four nodes (Train/Val/Test/Reject) which may be tight but avoids overlap.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption references '120 discarded at ingestion' with no corresponding Ingestion node in the figure; 'of which 820 enter filtering' is redundant; single Reject node hides per-stage attrition.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF confirmed to embed /Subtype /Type3 fonts (DejaVuSans, DejaVuSans-Bold) — text is not selectable or editable; fonttype=42 was never set in the script.
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs present and non-trivial: figure.pdf (18 KB), figure.png (43 KB), caption.tex (434 B), gen_figure.py (6.8 KB); bonus figure.svg also produced.
evidence.caption_quality: Provides specific numerical claims (600 train 73.2%, 120 val 14.6%, 100 test 12.2%) and cites data.json, but mentions an ingestion-discard step (120 samples) not visible in the figure.

overall_strengths: All required output files are present and non-trivial, with a bonus SVG; the Sankey layout correctly encodes flow magnitudes as ribbon widths.
Caption supplies concrete percentages and absolute counts, giving a reader a quantitative summary without needing to read the figure.
overall_weaknesses: PDF uses Type 3 (bitmap) fonts instead of Type 42 — text is not selectable or editable, failing the vector-fidelity requirement; DejaVu Sans is used explicitly against the brief's guidance.
Red assigned to the neutral 'Filtered' node violates directional-color discipline and creates a red-green colorblind hazard; the caption describes an ingestion step absent from the figure.
